mapper.select:
select c.community_no, c.community_title, c.community_content, c.community_writer, to_char(c.community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as community_date, c.view_count, m.member_name, m.member_thumb, m.member_grade, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count,
(select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl d where c.community_no = d.community_no) as dislike_count,
(select count(*) from community_report_tbl r where c.community_no = r.community_no) as report_count,
(select count(*) from community_comment_tbl cc where c.community_no = cc.community_no) as comment_count,
(select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = (select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = c.community_writer)) as hex_code
, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl cl where cl.community_no = c.community_no and cl.member_id = #{memberId}) as is_like , (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl cd where cd.community_no = c.community_no and cd.member_id = #{memberId}) as is_dislike
from community_tbl c join member_tbl m on (c.community_writer = m.member_id) where c.community_status = 1
and ( c.community_title like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or regexp_replace(c.community_content, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' )
and ( c.community_writer like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or regexp_replace(c.community_writer, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or m.member_name like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' )
and m.member_grade=3
and m.member_grade in (1, 2)
order by c.community_no desc order by c.community_no asc order by c.view_count desc order by like_count desc order by dislike_count desc order by report_count desc offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select count(*) from community_tbl c join member_tbl m on (community_writer = m.member_id) where community_status = 1
and ( c.community_title like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or regexp_replace(c.community_content, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' )
and ( c.community_writer like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or regexp_replace(c.community_writer, '<[^>]*>', '') like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' or m.member_name like '%' || replace(replace(replace(#{searchKeyword}, '\', '\\'), '_', '\_'), '%', '\%') || '%' escape '\' )
and member_grade=3
and member_grade in (1, 2)
mapper.insert: insert into community_tbl ( community_no, community_title, community_content, community_date, community_status, community_writer, view_count ) values ( community_seq.nextval, #{communityTitle}, #{communityContent}, sysdate, 1, #{communityWriter}, 0 )
mapper.select: select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, view_count, member_name, member_thumb, to_char(community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi') as community_date, (select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = (select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = community_writer)) as hex_code from community_tbl join member_tbl on (community_writer = member_id) where community_no = #{communityNo}

select c.community_no, c.community_title, c.community_content, c.community_writer, to_char(c.community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') community_date, c.view_count,
(select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) like_count, (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl d where c.community_no = d.community_no) dislike_count
, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl cl where cl.community_no = c.community_no and cl.member_id = #{memberId}) is_like , (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl cd where cd.community_no = c.community_no and cd.member_id = #{memberId}) is_dislike
from community_tbl c join member_tbl m on (c.community_writer = m.member_id) where c.community_status = 1
and m.member_grade in 3 order by like_count desc, c.community_no desc
and m.member_grade in (1, 2) order by c.community_no desc
offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only
select count(*) from community_comment_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and community_recomment_no is null

select t.community_comment_no, t.community_no, t.community_comment_writer, t.community_comment_content, to_char(t.community_comment_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') community_comment_date, t.community_recomment_no, t.is_edited, m.member_name, m.member_thumb, (select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl cl where cl.community_comment_no = t.community_comment_no) like_count, (select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl cd where cd.community_comment_no = t.community_comment_no) dislike_count,
(select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl cl where cl.community_comment_no = t.community_comment_no and cl.member_id = #{memberId}) is_like, (select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl cd where cd.community_comment_no = t.community_comment_no and cd.member_id = #{memberId}) is_dislike, (select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = (select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = community_comment_writer)) as hex_code from ( select * from community_comment_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo}
start with community_comment_no in ( select community_comment_no from ( select community_comment_no from community_comment_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and community_recomment_no is null
order by community_comment_no asc
order by community_comment_no desc
order by (select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl where community_comment_no = community_comment_tbl.community_comment_no) desc, community_comment_no desc
order by (select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl where community_comment_no = community_comment_tbl.community_comment_no) desc, community_comment_no desc
) offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only )
connect by prior community_comment_no = community_recomment_no
order by community_comment_no asc
order by community_comment_no desc
order by (select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl where community_comment_no = community_comment_tbl.community_comment_no) desc, community_comment_no desc
order by (select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl where community_comment_no = community_comment_tbl.community_comment_no) desc, community_comment_no desc
) t left join member_tbl m on (t.community_comment_writer = m.member_id)
mapper.insert: insert into community_comment_tbl values ( community_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{communityCommentContent}, sysdate, #{communityNo}, #{communityCommentWriter}, #{communityRecommentNo}, 0 )
mapper.update: update community_comment_tbl set community_comment_content = #{communityCommentContent}, is_edited = 1 where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo}
select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo}
select count(*) from community_comment_like_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
select count(*) from community_comment_dislike_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from community_comment_like_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
delete from community_comment_dislike_tbl where community_comment_no = #{communityCommentNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo}
select count(*) from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from community_like_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
delete from community_dislike_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into community_report_tbl (community_no, member_id, report_reason) values (#{communityNo}, #{memberId}, #{reportReason})
mapper.delete: delete from community_report_tbl where community_no=#{communityNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
